query:
UPDATE recruitment_prospects
SET pipelineStage = 'archived',
    archivedAt = NOW(),
    adminNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(adminNotes, ''), ' | [Auto-archived 2026-05-12: Email matches an existing active agent account — no further recruitment emails will be sent.]')
WHERE id IN (90005, 90044, 90093, 90190, 90400, 90462, 90634, 90668, 90703, 90715, 90743);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute 
UPDATE recruitment_prospects

    archivedAt = NOW(),
    adminNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(adminNotes, ''), ' | [Auto-archived 2026-05-12: Email matches an existing active agent account — no further recruitment emails will be sent.]')
WHERE id IN (90005, 90044, 90093, 90190, 90400, 90462, 90634, 90668, 90703, 90715, 90743);
